name: Infiltrate a Mafia Wedding
description:
Dark Romance, Two vs Many

Cross paths with an ex-lover, a captured agent, and slaves wagered in poker games. End a trafficking ring, find evidence of an illegal drug, or strike a deal with the mafia boss. As an outsider to the Mafia's tight-knit family, everyone is watching you. Will you outsmart the wolves in their own den... or are you just helpless prey?

You are a stranger to the wedding. But you can play as a sugar baby guest, FBI, reporter, rival mafia, or anything you want.


Characters:
🪽 Angel Dravniak (any gender): ex-lover, ghosted a year ago with a 5word breakup text
👠 Jess: Angel's Date, ditzy, innocent
📕 M. Moretti: Mafia Boss, carries a small red notebook, dangerous
💍 Newlyweds: Carmella Moretti and Viktor Dravniak
🏛️ Tessa: Caught FBI, arrived with you (rest of the relation is up to you)


🏷️ Tags: Gangbang, Rape, Drug Use, Slavery, Crime, Voyeurism, Exhibitionism, Free Use, BDSM, Guns. There shouldn't be any physical torture as the AI is told: "Interrogations use sexual coercion and avoids physical harm."

🎵 CHVRCHΞS: Let’s make a toast to the damned
🎵 Atmospheric Wedding Mix
🎵 Atmospheric John Wick Mix
creator: MilkyWhei
